reviews.review_description: Played the first three stages and it is not for me. I like the idea of being a light warrior, but the fight mechanics are not interestibg enough for me. Furthermore it seems that the game can be outplayed in 1.5 hours since those are rhe times seen on the scoreboard. I disn't like the idea beinf busy clearing a stage as fast as possible.

rarely fantastic game in VR
outstanding game system and hand tracking 
hoping for a sequel or something similar!
nice work!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We just pushed a new update, have fun :)

reviews.review_description: Great job with the new Survivor Mode!

developer_response.body: Thank you ! We're glad you enjoyed our new update !

reviews.review_description: The game play is amazing and fight back is amazing as well I just love the graphics and animations inside of the game ￼

This is a great game!! It makes me move and gets my heart rate up. The hand tracking is excellent! The story is interesting. Visuals are beautiful and immersive. This is going to be a unique and motivating addition to my daily workout. I was not able to figure out how to renew my energy with the aim, grab and pull move, but all the other actions were intuitive and useful!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your feedback and enthusiasm!! 
The Dev Team

reviews.review_description: I was skeptical based on videos but it had such good reviews and I really enjoyed the Fight Back demo. Unfortunately this is less good than the demo. Much less visually interesting and so far less fun hand gestures. It is longer and perhaps a little more physical than the demo but overall that was a much better experience and this feels like such a let down after that.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear this, especially we've made so much improvement on hand tracking detection since Fight Back, and added a lot more gestures, enemies and levels! Thank you for the kind words on Fight Back however, we appreciate it!

reviews.review_description: i use my quest just for exercise, but it's great to have some more fun game mechanics than pure workout apps.  and one can only have so many rhythm games and fighting games - great as those are.  masters of light is completely unique, different from anything else out there.  yet at the highest levels it's still a great workout that can keep my heart rate above 140.  and it's fun and sensible.  i think it's super under rated compared to many of the other games that are usually discussed for vr fitness.  give it a try!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're super happy you're enjoying Masters of Light and using it for your fitness workout!

reviews.review_description:
This game is really well designed. The gameplay is easy to get the hang of, but becomes challenging enough to keep you interested. Beautiful visuals and music, with a thin story that is just enough to keep you interested. 

The only drawback is that it is fairly short, and playing the game again to try and beat your score gets old after a while. I'm looking forward to seeing what else the developers add to it down the line. For now, I'm still working my way through, and it is a lot of fun. Prepare to have sore arms!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We appreciate your kind words :)

reviews.review_description: This is so fun!  I wanted something that would get me some cardio, and this game didn't disappoint. It's a unique game that while you do punch, you're not punching targets or people like other games,  You're shooting when you punch. Hands done,  this is a must for people that want something different from other workout games.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind review! Have fun!

reviews.review_title: How to finally enjoy your workout
reviews.review_description: Great game! Very physical. Hand tracking is the best way to use it. You'll find yourself punching and blocking attacks for hours. I love the design, quite original. More relaxing than beatsaber even if the pace is quite intense.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We're thrilled you're enjoying Masters of Light :)

reviews.review_description: **Masters of Light VR** is an immersive puzzle game where players manipulate light and shadows to solve challenges in stunning, detailed environments. The gameplay is intuitive, with a satisfying difficulty curve that keeps things engaging. The visuals are a standout, with realistic lighting effects that enhance the experience. The game also offers replayability with multiple puzzle solutions and hidden collectibles. Overall, *Masters of Light VR* is a must-play for anyone who enjoys visually impressive and thoughtfully designed VR puzzle games.

The core gameplay is so well done and one of the best hand tracking games out there! BUT this game is way too short. I was able to beat it on normal difficulty in about 2/3 hours. 

I am excited for new updates!! Hopefully they add more levels with new enemy types. Also the boss battle at the end was rather disappointing.

Overall the gameplay was very fun, using hand gestures to fight, defend and snipe.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Yes, indeed we have more content planned soon! In the meantime, you can replay all unlocked levels and get three stars if you haven't already. Stay tuned for future announcements, we're excited for what's coming :)

reviews.review_description:
I haven't tried many hand-tracking games, so this would be the best VR game with hand-tracking I have played so far. However, I had hoped for more.

I was very impressed during the first half hour of my time in the game, but after going through a few levels, it became repetitive quickly. There was a lot of punching in the air and blocking a few times.

The visuals in the game are very nice, but sometimes the background felt a little disorienting and made me slightly motion sick. However, the overall effects looked good.

To me, the game felt more like an arcade experience with the same type of enemies attacking in almost every level. I didn't feel very invested in the story.

In conclusion, I will give this game 3 stars. The concept of the game is very good, but it falls short in terms of story and the incentive to continue playing through the levels.

reviews.review_title: Serene and Tranquil! Until it's not...
reviews.review_description:
Masters of light is a great demonstration of hand tracking for people newer to VR.
For VR veterans looking for a deeper experience, that's also kinda here too...

The story will take you through the cosmos on a tour of destruction to save your fallen cosmic sisters.

Using your hands primarily (controllers optional) you will blast the enemies away with different abilities, albeit from a stationary 180° battlefield.

With 36 levels to play through, and varying space environments to admire while using your abilities, which you gain from advancing through the story,
There is some fun to be had.

Pros.

Great looking environments

Full story with moderately well produced voice acting

Slight progression to pull you further though the story

Energetic gameplay, which surprises you when you take the headset off, realising you're drenched!

Cons.

Combat can feel stale

Stationary wave shooter format

The story didn't keep me interested after the second solar system

Same character models used over and over again made it feel like you weren't progressing much.

Overall,

A game I would chuck on to disappear into the ether, enjoy nice serene space visuals and relax whilst also getting a sweat on and moving my body.

Figure that one out! 😂

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your thorough review! ! It's indeed a funny paradox to describe a "serene and relaxing" space while getting a nice workout ;)
We take your feedback with gratitude and thank you for playing our game!

reviews.review_description: I can’t get pass the third level because the shield won’t block bad design 1 star

developer_response.body: Hey the.gamer.dude.468961 ! Sorry you got stuck. We've created a very detailed explanations for each moves in video on our YT channel (@WECOVEN / the shield video is here : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XX2WEkltY08). Let us know if it helps. You can also contact us on our Discord support channel (https://discord.gg/S6pUVvJNWZ).

reviews.review_title: Good hand tracking, not much else.
reviews.review_description: The hand tracking is fun and works well. Ultimately the game starts to feel repetitive quickly, and most of the powers added throughout are pointless.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! Thank you for playing, we're sorry to hear that you're feeling this way. As you progress in the game, you'll encounter new enemies, make new strategies, and discover new game mechanics. We hope you'll revise your opinion later, but we value your feedback nonetheless! 
Best regards, the COVEN team.

reviews.review_description: Amazing game, such a workout. I believe it could use more content thought but its only in its early stages so its doing quite well.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing! We are hoping to add more content in, yes!

reviews.review_description: Wow an excellent work out. And an amazing game. If you are thinking about getting this. Just buy it. You won't regret it.

reviews.review_title: Fun and beautiful with lots of potential
reviews.review_description: First thing that struck me were the beautiful graphics and the hand tracking. Looking down at my hands felt magical, it has some of the best hand tracking I've used so far. The "universe" you play in had me constantly looking around as it's really beautiful. The game play was fun, but felt a bit slow and disjointed at times, BUT I see massive potential here. Keep up the good work, I can't wait to see how this game evolves.

Throwing punches to shoot light at your enemies and saving captured entities to unlock new powers and become stronger. Masters of Light is an action intense workout game with plenty of levels to play through and 5 powers to master. While certain enemy patterns are annoybing there's nothing that can't be beaten. The space backgrounds look stunning and the music always pumps me up. I find after a couple of levels I have gotten really comfortable in throwing the punches and challenge myself into not using the aiming system as much as I can. I would definitely recommend using the hand tracking.
